source_issue.title: Update how to get packages in develop

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue focuses on updating the documentation for getting packages in development. It stems from a related pull request and aims to ensure that our guides reflect the latest best practices.

## What needs to be done
The updates are required for the following documentation pages:
- [Common Management Tasks](https://6.docs.plone.org/install/manage-add-ons-packages.html#common-management-tasks)
- [Add-on Variables](https://6.docs.plone.org/install/containers/images/backend.html#add-on-variables)
- [Developing Packages](https://6.docs.plone.org/install/containers/images/backend.html#containers-images-backend-developing-packages-label)

## Helpful background
This issue originated from discussions in a related GitHub issue, where necessary changes highlighted the need for clearer instructions on package management within Plone development.

## Good first steps
1. Review the existing documentation linked above.
2. Identify areas that require updates or clarification based on current practices.
3. Consider reaching out to others (like the author or commenters) for feedback or additional insight on specific changes.
4. Prepare a pull request with your proposed modifications.

This task invites contributors of all levels. Don't hesitate to ask questions if anything is unclear!
```
